title: CAT Construction, Real Steel Max Dump Truck 12" - Heavy Duty Steel Construction Toy with Realistic Working Dump Bed – Durable Vehicle for Indoor & Outdoor Play – Ages 3+, Yellow
features: REAL STRENGTH: 12” dump truck with real working steel parts.
EASY TO MANEUVER: Smaller in size but just as mighty, ideal for younger builders looking for realistic construction play.
BUILT FOR DURABILITY: Built with a sturdy steel dump bed and plastic to withstand tough play both indoors and outdoors.
REALISTIC ARTICULATION: Features movable parts for realistic dumping action. Load and unload with the working dump bed, perfect for construction play.
AGES 3 AND UP: Ideal for young builders looking for a compact, durable construction vehicle.
description: Product Description The Cat Compact Steel Dump Truck is smaller in size but mighty in strength! This 12” vehicle is made with sturdy steel construction and features articulated parts that allow for realistic movement and play. You’re in control of the action, load up the rugged dump bed, haul your load to its destination, and use the real working dump bed to unload. Perfect for young builders who want to experience the power and durability of Cat construction machines. Appropriate for ages 3 and up. Directions To play with this dump truck, simply move the dump bed up and down to simulate loading and unloading materials. This heavy-duty steel construction truck is ready to play right out of the box. Safety Warning Choking Hazard – Small Parts. Not for children under 3 years. See more
